prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-14INCHSIFTCLASS-GRN-FBA Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor DEEP STACKING 1/4" Classifier Screen with Handles, Heavy Duty 5 Gallon Plastic Sifting Sieve Description: The newest addition to ASR Outdoor classifier screen product line up are these large, six inch deep plastic stackable 5 gallon sifting screens with built in handle, ideal for working with and sifting out gold rich pay dirt or other valuable sifted items from unwanted raw material. Importantly, these heavy duty plastic sifting screen is able to be stacked on top of a five gallon bucket, and are also compatible with all other sizes of ASR Outdoor stainless steel mesh classifiers.

Specifications:

- Top Diameter: 13.25 inches - Bottom Diameter: 10 inches - Depth: 6 inches - Mesh Size: 4 holes per square inch (1/4 inch) - Durable Polypropylene Plastic Material

These heavy duty plastic gold rush sifting screens are ideal for working with coarse or more fine raw materials. Designed to be stacked on top of a five gallon bucket, use these plastic sifting screens or soil sifters to separate high value pay dirt from other unwanted organic material, like rocks, gravels, plant matter and aggregates.

Two important design features to note: depth and built in handles. The depth of this plastic sifting screen is intentional and will allow you to move through much more raw material in comparison to a more shallow classifier screen. Lastly, when carrying and working with heavier and large amounts of material, you'll appreciate the two built in side handles, making the plastic sifting screen easier to maneuver.

ASR Outdoor heavy duty plastic sifting screen is made from tough and durable polypropylene plastic that will see you through many gold prospecting or rock hounding seasons to come. The high quality plastic material will never rust, making it a great classifier suitable for all types of weather. To maintain longevity, rinse and air dry between uses. The plastic classifier would also make a great gardening or foraging tool. Search Terms: mealworm sifter garden sieve gold prospecting equipment fossil kit gardening tools foraging dry sift screen soil sifter paydirt sluice box mining kit 5 gallon bucket geology rock screening pan brass reload kit Features: - 1/4" CLASSIFIER SCREEN: Featuring 4 holes per square inch, this classifier is ideal to use towards the end of the classification process when working with finer materials; six inch depth allows for large amounts of material processing and can be stacked on top of a 5 gallon bucket - 5 GALLON BUCKET CLASSIFIER: Gold rush plastic sifting screens have been designed to stack on top of a 5 gallon bucket to create a vertical classification system, and are also compatible with all other ASR Outdoor stainless steel mesh classifier screens - HEAVY DUTY ABS PLASTIC: Soil sifter is made of high quality and durable polypropylene plastic; rust and UV resistant and can be used in all kinds of weather; Rinse and air dry between uses - FUNCTIONAL SIDE HANDLES: When classifying more coarse and heavier materials in the field, the built in side handles will make carrying, moving and sifting easier and less strenuous on hands, arms and back - SPECIFICATIONS: Size: 1/4 inch (4 holes per square inch); Top Diameter: 13.25 inches; Bottom Diameter: 10 inches; Depth: 6 inches; Color: Green === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 14in Green 1/4" Classifier Screen Sifter

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 5-gal 1/4 in Green Deep Stacking Classifier Screen

anthropic.title_differentiation: 6 Inch Deep, Stackable 5 Gallon Bucket, Built-in Handles, Heavy Duty Polypropylene, Gold Prospecting

openai.title_differentiation: 6 Inch Deep, Built In Side Handles, 5 Gallon Bucket Fit, Rust Resistant Polypropylene, 14 Inch Mesh
